# Synthetic Knowledge Bundle

A minimal valid OKF v0.1 bundle used for conformance testing.

# Concepts

* [Data Model](./concepts/data-model.md) - Conceptual data model for the sample domain.
* [Onboarding Playbook](./playbooks/onboarding.md) - Steps to onboard a new team member.

# Subdirectories

* [concepts/](./concepts/) - Abstract domain concepts.
* [playbooks/](./playbooks/) - Operational runbooks.
